name: d1-lipschitz
description: Penumbra Wave 3 Phase 3 + 5c — Tier D1 per-brick directional Lipschitz field. Pins the always-on D1 path across four scenes: Multi-Field (baseline + sub-brick refinement), Mechanical Assembly (CSG-edge thin features, expected D1 benefit), and 12-Sphere Blob (smooth union, sanity for no-regression). Per-brick Bernstein-trivariate coefficients are written by populate.wgsl from sampled gradient magnitudes at 4×4×4 = 64 grid points; main-atlas.wgsl's `lipschitzAtBrick(slotIdx, dir)` evaluates the polynomial at the ray's direction and divides marchRay's stepDist by the result (with `max(L, 1.0)` floor for sphere-tracing safety). All four fixtures unconditional — D1 is the shipping behavior post-Wave-3-Phase-3, no flag toggle. Phase 5c added the assembly + atlas-blob coverage to broaden the regression net beyond the original Multi-Field-only suite.
